final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing character illustration for a Chinese fantasy game, depicting a Hanfu-clad woman playing the guqin in a bamboo grove.

Style/medium: Chinese fantasy game character splash art, ethereal xianxia aesthetic with painterly brushwork reminiscent of ancient Chinese scroll painting
Subject: elegant Hanfu-clad woman seated playing the guqin (Chinese zither), flowing wide sleeves caught mid-movement, serene expression, long flowing hair, graceful posture
Composition: medium shot with slight low angle, figure centered with guqin on lap, dynamic diagonal flow of sleeves and hair
Scene/backdrop: dense bamboo grove at night, tall bamboo stalks creating vertical rhythm, dappled moonlight filtering through layered leaves
Lighting/mood: soft diffused moonlight from above creating dappled shadows on ground and figure, gentle ethereal glow, mysterious and transcendent atmosphere
Color palette: cool jade greens and deep forest blues for bamboo, warm ivory and pale blue for Hanfu, silvery moonlight accents
Materials/textures: silk Hanfu fabric with subtle sheen, smooth bamboo surfaces, polished wooden guqin, delicate hair strands
Avoid: modern clothing, anachronistic elements, harsh shadows, cluttered composition, generic anime style, photorealistic rendering
